description:
Internal Affairs suspects a rogue detective accessed a sealed evidence locker and modified a digital device after it was officially seized. Validate the cryptographic chain of custody for three seized USB drives (seized_usb_1.dd, seized_usb_2.dd, seized_usb_3.dd) in /home/ga/evidence/ by comparing their current SHA-256 hashes against the official acquisition log at /home/ga/evidence/Chain_of_Custody_Log.txt. Identify the tampered drive and any files modified or created after the official Seizure Date of 2023-05-01 00:00:00 UTC. Create an Autopsy case named Evidence_Audit_2024 (Case ID: IA-001) in /home/ga/Cases/ to conduct the investigation. Write an Audit Report to /home/ga/Reports/integrity_audit.txt containing the following lines:
TAMPERED_IMAGE: <filename.dd>
ORIGINAL_SHA256: <original hash from the log>
CURRENT_SHA256: <the newly calculated hash>
PLANTED_FILES: <comma-separated list of filenames modified/created after the seizure date>
CONCLUSION: <Brief 1-2 sentence summary of findings>
